description: Reusable skill to execute any httpbin test operation: authentication, HTTP method testing, or status code return. Given a test type and parameters, constructs and sends the appropriate HTTP request and validates the response.

evaluation.validation_summary: Ctx2Skill-lite preview verifier contract. External corpus parse/audit keeps this ephemeral until a human approves import.

implementation.prompt_template: Construct an HTTP request to httpbin based on the provided test_type and params. Send the request, parse the response, and check if it matches expected behavior. Return success, status, and body.

params.description: Parameters specific to the test type (e.g., username/password for auth, method for http_method, code for status_code)

postconditions: An HTTP request has been sent to httpbin and the response has been validated.
preconditions: The httpbin API is reachable and operational.

name: httpbin_test_executor_api_doc_httpbin_basic_openapi

challenges.expected_evidence: Successful authentication returns 200 with authenticated=true; failed returns 401 or 403.
challenges.failure_signal: Response does not match expected status/body for given credentials.
rubric: Send a request to an authentication endpoint (e.g., basic-auth) with valid credentials
Send a request with invalid credentials
Verify that the response status code and body indicate success or failure
challenges.task: Test HTTP authentication methods using the httpbin API

challenges.expected_evidence: Each method returns appropriate status codes (e.g., 200 for GET, 201 for POST) and echoes request data if applicable.
challenges.failure_signal: Unexpected status code or missing echo data.
rubric: Send a GET request and verify response
Send a POST request with a payload and verify response
Send a PUT request and verify response
Send a DELETE request and verify response
challenges.task: Test various HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) using the httpbin API

challenges.expected_evidence: Response status code equals the requested code.
challenges.failure_signal: Response status code does not match the requested code.
rubric: Verify that the response status code matches the requested one
challenges.task: Return specified HTTP status codes using the httpbin API

constraints: No constraints provided in the context.
examples: No examples provided in the context.
facts: The API is designed for testing HTTP functionalities.
It includes operations for authentication, various HTTP methods, and returning specified status codes.
procedures: No specific procedures provided in the context; baseline extracted actions suggest testing auth, methods, and status codes.
context_pack.summary: OpenAPI specification for httpbin.org, a testing API for HTTP authentication methods, HTTP methods, and status codes. The spec provides tags for auth, HTTP methods, and status codes.

selected_candidate.name: httpbin_test_executor
postconditions: An HTTP request has been sent to httpbin and the response has been validated.
preconditions: The httpbin API is reachable and operational.
selected_candidate.prompt_template: Construct an HTTP request to httpbin based on the provided test_type and params. Send the request, parse the response, and check if it matches expected behavior. Return success, status, and body.

ctx2skill_evidence.selected_reason: The httpbin_test_executor skill has a higher cross-time replay lite score (0.85) because it covers all three challenge tasks (auth, methods, status codes) with a single reusable interface, while the httpbin_auth_tester only addresses one challenge. The generic skill is more versatile and better satisfies the goal of creating a reusable capability from the context.

# sourced from https://github.com/Kong/swagger-ui-kong-theme/blob/main/demo/public/specs/httpbin.yaml
openapi: 3.0.1
info:
  version: '1.0-oas3'
  title: httpbin
  description: An unofficial OpenAPI definition for [httpbin.org](https://httpbin.org).

tags:
  - name: auth
    description: Operations for testing various authentication types
  - name: HTTP methods
    description: Operations for testing different HTTP methods
  - name: Status codes
    description: Return the specified HTTP status
